description: 60-deg sector slice with CORD2C nodes and oblique MPC BC; displacements should match the full-ring benchmark on the same coarse CQUAD4 mesh.

checks.comment: Node 7 (theta=0, outer): radial T1 matches the full-ring benchmark.
Node 7: T2 = 0 (SPC tangential constraint at theta=0)
Node 1 (theta=0, inner): radial T1 matches the full-ring benchmark.
Node 8 (theta=60, outer): T1 component from the full-ring benchmark.
Node 8 (theta=60, outer): T2 component from the full-ring benchmark.
Element 1 von Mises stress matches the full-ring benchmark.
